project_type: C++ monolithic AI assistant (single compilation unit)
build_system: Make with clang++, single-file compilation (mk_entry.cpp #includes all modules)
test_framework: Custom test framework in tests/test_main.cpp with TEST_ASSERT macros, includes tests/test_integration.cpp
verification_instructions:
1. Run 'make clean && make' to ensure build succeeds. 2. Run 'make test' to ensure all tests pass. 3. Run: rm -rf prometheus_data genesis_data cxn_crystals.dat && printf 'hello
what is 5 times 3
what is python
bye
/quit
' | ./mk_os to verify runtime behavior.
setup_instructions: No special setup needed. Project uses system libcurl and libsqlite3.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. macOS/Linux build with clang++ or g++.
contribution_requirements: No formal contribution guide. Keep code compiling with -Wall -Wextra.
key_patterns: Single compilation unit: mk_entry.cpp #includes all .cpp files. All modules use #ifndef guards. MKSystem struct holds all module instances. Telegram poll loop runs in a separate thread with mutex protection. Each module is a class in its own .cpp file.
relevant_files: MK_OS/system/mk_entry.cpp (main orchestrator, ~3089 lines, must be heavily refactored)
MK_OS/tests/test_main.cpp (must update to remove deleted module tests)
MK_OS/tests/test_integration.cpp (must update to remove thinking/decision tests)
directory_structure: MK_OS/ is the main build dir. ai_core/ has AI modules. llm/ has LLM integration. system/ has entry point. tests/ has test files. mk_brain/ has memory/personality. homelab/ has device management. crypto/ has trading. plugins/ has telegram. mind/ has goal/mastery.
